    Fluent assertions for numeric values (int, long, double, etc.).
    ObjectCheck<T>
    Fluent assertions for arbitrary objects.
    OffsetDateTimeCheck
    Fluent assertions for OffsetDateTime values.
    OptionalCheck<T>
    Fluent assertions for Optional values.

    Base class for checks on Comparable values.
    Reality
    Main entry point for Reality Check assertions.
    RealityAssertions
    Drop-in alias using the assertThat naming convention familiar to users of AssertJ, Truth, and Hamcrest.
    SealedClassCheck
    Fluent assertions for sealed classes/interfaces (Java 17+).
    SoftChecks
    Soft assertion entry point.
    StatementBuilder
    Builder for assertions with a custom failure message.
    StreamCheck<T>
    Fluent assertions for Stream values.

    Fluent assertions for String values.
    ThrowableCheck
    Fluent assertions for exceptions.

    UriCheck
